text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer! Is your tummy growling?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, guess what? I bought some carrot<n>bread just
for you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's super-duper yummy, so you<n>definitely gotta
try it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I left it in my desk, so if you ever feel<n>hungry,
just—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I did buy it for you, but it looked sogood that I ate it without thinking!
